# tcg-sandbox_lore_post (Data Source)

Fetches a lore post from a TCG Sandbox game.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `game_id` (String) The ID of the game this lore post belongs to.
- `id` (String) The unique identifier of the lore post.

### Read-Only

- `title` (String) The title of the lore post.
